name: create_appointment
description: Book an appointment after the caller has confirmed branch, doctor, date, and time out loud. ALWAYS include caller_full_name. NEVER create an anonymous booking. Prefer UUIDs from get_clinic_catalog / search_availability. start_time MUST include a timezone offset.
execution_message_description: Short confirmation-hold while writing the booking.

caller_full_name.description: Exact full name spoken by the caller. Required even if patient_id is known.

practitioner_name.description: Doctor name if UUID is not in context.

branch_id.description: Branch UUID being booked. Must match the branch said out loud.

branch_name.description: Branch name if UUID is not in context.

appointment_type_name.description: Appointment type name if UUID is not in context.

start_time.description: ISO-8601 datetime WITH timezone offset from search_availability, e.g. 2026-07-16T09:00:00+05:30.
